title: Asset manifest + async delivery + delivery-speed profiling

reboot.note: PLAN+ANCHOR: AssetManifest (7th versioned schema), AssetFetcher+WallClock seams, AssetLoader split into loadCriticalTier/streamDeferredTier

anchor.note: IMPLEMENT: render/assets/*.ts + AssetManifest.test.ts (7) + AssetLoader.test.ts (6); fixed a RenderIsolation false-positive (dm-0101)

verify.note: INTEGRATE: PKG updated in-change (render/assets real node; hash s9-a7c3f9 -> s9-b8d4a0); ledger at dm-0101

integrate.note: REPORT: S9.7 -> COMPLETED. REQ-163/132/002 gain their S9.7 share.

acceptance.criterion: loadCriticalTier gates readiness (blocks on critical, halts+errors on failure); streamDeferredTier runs after, degrading a failed asset without blocking or throwing — both tested against a scripted fake fetcher+clock
per-asset elapsedMs via injected WallClock matches scripted deltas exactly (REQ-132 P9 asset-delivery-speed share); diagnostic-only, confined like the P8 profiler
critical/deferred tiering means first render is gated only on truly essential assets — the async-delivery mechanism that keeps loads short
